allow: Bash(docker --version && docker compose version && nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,memory.total,driver_version --format=csv,noheader 2>/dev/null || echo "nvidia-smi失败")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=3 -p 30001 admin123@127.0.0.1 "echo ok" 2>&1 || echo "需要密码或失败")
Bash(ss -tlnp | grep -E "22|30001" && systemctl status ssh 2>/dev/null | head -5 || systemctl status sshd 2>/dev/null | head -5)
